free_text: High Resolution Fission Cross Section of Uranium-235
Two targets each containing 177 microg/cm**2 of 235U
in oxide form evaporated onto stainless steel backing,
located at 45 degrees to vertical neutron beam.
2 solid state detectors located at 55 and 90
degrees with respect to vertical neutron beam.
No information on source of uncertainty.
Converted to new date format, lower case.
Data taken from private comm., Keyworth, January 1971.
Data corrected for time shift of .4e-06 sec. in the
